subject: Young humanoid figure with lavender hair in fighting stance, sword visible, red energy aura
suspected_ip: Trunks (Dragon Ball Z / Dragon Ball Super)
description: A young humanoid figure stands in a mid-shot fighting stance. The figure has lavender or light-purple hair — a distinctive visual marker. A sword is clearly visible, held or drawn as part of the fighting posture. A red or crimson energy aura surrounds the figure, and the foil finish adds a metallic shimmer to the entire card. The expression is determined and combative. The background is a warm red-orange energy field consistent with battle tension.
foreground: young figure with lavender hair, sword, and red energy aura
background: red-orange energy field with foil shimmer
